display_text: Occult Bracelet, Tier 1: Neutral item providing a stacking mana regeneration passive. Each time the wearer is attacked, they gain a stack of +0.4 mana regen, up to 5 stacks (max +2.0 mana regen). Stacks last for 5 seconds. Provides no other stats, functioning as a mana sustain item for heroes frequently taking harass in lane or team fights. Stats: Max Stacks: 5, Mana Regen per Stack: 0.4, Stack Duration: 5s.
